otelcol.signal.description: The signal type the telemetry metric is associated with

pod_identifier.description: The source(s) used to identify the pod, formatted as 'from/name' (e.g., 'connection', 'resource_attribute/k8s.pod.ip'). Does not contain actual identifier values to avoid high cardinality.

status.description: The status of the pod association operation

description: The Kubernetes Attributes Processor allows adding k8s metadata to resource attributes for spans, metrics and logs.
name: k8sattributesprocessor
